title: Kansas Statutes § 8-1501 Application of sections in article 15.
text:
8-1501. Application of sections in article 15. The provisions of this article relating to the operation of vehicles refer exclusively to the operation of vehicles upon highways except:
(a) Where a different place is specifically referred to in a given section; and
(b) The provisions of K.S.A. 8-1566 through 8-1568 and the provisions of article 10 of chapter 8 of the Kansas Statutes Annotated, and amendments thereto, shall apply upon highways and elsewhere throughout the state.
History: L. 1974, ch. 33, § 8-1501; L. 2012, ch. 172, § 19; L. 2018, ch. 106, § 12; July 1.
caption: Application of sections in article 15.
